summary: Python script is clean, well-typed, and modular. Critical workflow issues: (1) env var fallback (lines 10-11) uses bash `||` which doesn't work in GitHub Actions expressions—should use `inputs.rules or if-then-else syntax`; (2) workflow expects fixtures/rules.json and fixtures/changed_files.txt but they're only created by test harness, not repo; (3) label extraction (run_act_tests.sh:49-53) relies on fragile regex pipeline; (4) bash lacks `set -e -o pipefail`; (5) test setup duplication (lines 29-35). Workflow won't validate with actionlint due to env var syntax and will fail on first run without pre-created fixtures.
